projects.title: knkt
projects.description: A Bluetooth-powered mobile networking app built by students, for students. Uses AI-driven compatibility scoring to connect nearby university students with complementary skills. Transforms physical proximity into unanticipated, meaningful collaborations for startups, research, and side projects.

projects.title: Sanos
projects.description: An automated debugging platform for Next.js applications. Monitors client-side crashes, server exceptions, and Vercel build failures in real time, then traces each error to the causal commit using AI-powered root cause analysis. Automatically opens reviewed pull requests with fixes, integrating with GitHub, Vercel, and CodeRabbit to close the developer debugging loop end-to-end.

projects.title: Banana Coin
projects.description: A gamified high-frequency trading simulator built around a fictional cryptocurrency that "rots" in value when left idle. Features real-time price updates, an exponential rot mechanic that encourages active trading, and several unlockable AI-powered trading bots with prebuilt and custom natural-language strategies for automated workflows.

projects.title: RootCode
projects.description: Developed a machine learning pipeline that predicts moisture content in maize populations in the Central Corn Belt region by filtering and cleaning 3,000+ features down to high-quality predictors, applying PCA to capture genetic and environmental patterns, and testing multiple ML algorithms for production use.

projects.title: BeenDone
projects.description: A startup validation tool for founders that searches a vectorized database of 5,000+ YC-backed companies to deliver AI-powered competitive analysis before you write a single line of code. Features semantic vector search, feature radar charts, funding and stage distribution breakdowns, a geographic heat map of competitors, inline pivot suggestions, and downloadable venture fund proposal PDFs.
